beats.what: The ginger kitten sits still, looking towards the camera through the foliage.
The kitten begins to walk forward towards the camera.
The kitten continues walking forward through the bushes.
The kitten walks closer to the camera, its front paw stepping forward.
The kitten walks directly towards the camera, filling more of the frame.

formal.text: A ginger kitten observes the camera through foliage.
The subject continues its approach through the bushes.
The subject advances, extending a front paw.
The subject occupies the majority of the frame.

sarcastic.text: A tiny orange menace prepares for battle.
The unstoppable force begins its slow, menacing approach.
Nature is truly terrifying right now.
Brace yourself for the inevitable fluff apocalypse.

humorous_tech.text: Initial system check: environment appears stable.
Wait, I see a bug in the bushes.
Critical error: production is now offline.

humorous_non_tech.text: Watch out, here comes the tiny paws.
